summary: Frontend testing of LED Sign Designer feature updates. All 10 features verified working through UI testing: Port dropdown with P1-P8 color indicators, font loading, pixel generation, border/fill pixel colors (cyan/green), thin white guide line, dotted red wiring lines, right-click context menu with Add Pixels/Connect Wire/Disconnect Wire options.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: LedCanvas.jsx line 4-8: WIRING_COLOR and GUIDE_STROKE properly defined as rgba(255,77,77,0.8) red and rgba(255,255,255,0.7) white
Wiring uses setLineDash([6, 4]) for dotted pattern at line 191
pixelUtils.js: Edge margin calculation includes pixel radius to prevent bleeding (line 72-86)
Context menu options have proper data-testid attributes: ctx-add-pixels, ctx-connect-wire, ctx-disconnect-wire
seed_data_creation: None - test-font.ttf from /app/frontend/public/ used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Test flow: 1) Load font via File > Load Font (use test-font.ttf), 2) Set text, 3) Click Generate, 4) Click pixels to select (shift+click for multiple), 5) Right-click for context menu (need 2+ pixels for full menu). Port dropdown visible next to Generate button.

test_features_verified.port_dropdown_button: PASS - Port dropdown visible in MenuBar showing P1 (0/1024) format
test_features_verified.port_dropdown_opens: PASS - Dropdown shows all 8 ports (P1-P8) with color indicators and pixel counts
test_features_verified.port_selection_visibility: PASS - Selecting port makes it automatically visible on canvas
test_features_verified.font_loading: PASS - File > Load Font menu option works correctly
test_features_verified.generate_button: PASS - Generate creates pixels when font is loaded
test_features_verified.font_outline_guide: PASS - Thin white reference line (GUIDE_STROKE = rgba(255,255,255,0.7))
test_features_verified.wiring_lines: PASS - Dotted red lines (WIRING_COLOR = rgba(255,77,77,0.8) with setLineDash([6, 4]))
test_features_verified.context_menu_add_pixels: PASS - 'Add Pixels Between...' option shown with data-testid='ctx-add-pixels' (requires 2+ selected)
test_features_verified.context_menu_connect_wire: PASS - 'Connect Wire' option shown with data-testid='ctx-connect-wire' (requires 2+ selected)
test_features_verified.context_menu_disconnect_wire: PASS - 'Disconnect Wire' option shown with data-testid='ctx-disconnect-wire' (requires 1+ selected)
test_features_verified.border_pixels_cyan: PASS - Border pixels render in cyan (#00d4ff)
test_features_verified.fill_pixels_green: PASS - Fill pixels render in green (#6bcb77)
test_features_verified.edge_margin: PASS - pixelUtils.js enforces edge margin with pixel radius check to prevent bleeding
